findings.description: The knowledge file adds a "必須" column marking properties 1–11 as required (○) for MailRequestTable. The source table has no required/optional column or any explicit marker for properties 1–11. Only property 12 (mailSendPatternIdColumnName) is explicitly marked as optional (任意) in the source. Furthermore, unlike MailRecipientTable, MailAttachedFileTable, MailTemplateTable, and MailRequestConfig — whose section titles include "(全て必須)" or "(すべて必須)" — the MailRequestTable section title carries no such qualifier. Adding a required column with ○ for all 11 properties is not supported by the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source MailRequestTable table has only two columns: No and プロパティ名/説明. No required/optional column exists. Section title: "nablarch.common.mail.MailRequestTableの設定" (no "すべて必須" qualifier). Only property 12 has explicit optionality: "メール送信パターンIDのカラム名(任意) 設定を省略した場合は、メール送信パターンIDは使用しない。"
